code:
<?php
add_filter( 'block_bindings_supported_attributes_core/button', function( $attributes ) {
    $attributes[] = 'ariaLabel';
    return $attributes;
} );

add_filter( 'render_block_core/button', function( $block_content, $block ) {
    if ( isset( $block['attrs']['ariaLabel'] ) && is_string( $block['attrs']['ariaLabel'] ) ) {
        $sanitized_aria_label = esc_attr( $block['attrs']['ariaLabel'] );
        $block_content = str_replace( 'aria-label="', 'aria-label="' . $sanitized_aria_label . '"', $block_content );
    }
    return $block_content;
}, 10, 2 );

<?php
register_rest_route('myplugin/v1', '/status', array(
    'methods' => 'GET',

        $response = new WP_REST_Response();
        $response->set_data(array(
            'status' => 'ok',
            'timestamp' => time()
        ));
        return $response;
    },
    'permission_callback' => function () {
        return true;
    }
));
